# MinAI — Full Site Content

> AI-Powered Marketing Automation for Small Businesses & Contractors

MinAI is a SaaS platform that replaces fragmented software tools (CRM, email, SMS, reputation management, booking, etc.) with a unified AI-powered marketing automation system. We build the complete AI infrastructure that captures, nurtures, and closes deals on autopilot.

Website: https://minai.biz

---

## Homepage

### Hero
**We Build The Machine That Builds Your Business.**

Stop chasing leads. Stop missing calls. Stop guessing. We install the complete AI infrastructure that captures, nurtures, and closes deals on autopilot.

Trusted Partners: Google, Meta, WordPress, GoDaddy, Canva

### Industries We Serve
- Local Service Contractors (HVAC, Roofing, Plumbing, Solar)
- Real Estate Developers (Condos, Subdivisions, Commercial)
- Agencies & Brokerages (Real Estate, Mortgage, Insurance)
- Personal Injury Law Firms (MVA, Slip & Fall, Workers Comp)

### The "Old Way" is Dead
Stop trying to outwork a broken system.

**The Amateur:**
- Misses calls while on the job site
- Chases "bad leads" for weeks
- Pays for 5 different software tools
- Relies on "word of mouth" (hope)

**The System Architect (MinAI):**
- AI answers calls & texts instantly 24/7
- Automated follow-up until they buy
- One platform, one price, total control
- Predictable revenue on demand

### The MinAI Ecosystem — 3 Phases

**Phase 1: Capture Every Opportunity**
Most websites are digital brochures. Ours are lead traps. We ensure you get found and nobody leaves without giving you their info.
- High-Converting Website Design
- Local SEO Domination
- Missed Call Text-Back (Never lose a lead)
- Unified Inbox (FB, IG, SMS, Email)

**Phase 2: Nurture On Autopilot**
The money is in the follow-up. Our AI chases leads for you, answers questions, and books appointments while you sleep.
- AI Booking Bot (24/7 Appointment Setter)
- Automated SMS & Email Sequences
- Database Reactivation (Wake up dead leads)
- Social Media Auto-Posting

**Phase 3: Close & Scale Reputation**
Turn happy customers into your best marketing channel. Automate reviews and payments to keep cash flow healthy.
- Automated Google Review Requests
- Text-to-Pay Invoicing
- Referral Management System
- Detailed ROI Reporting

### The Process — What Working with MinAI Looks Like

**Step 1 — The Demo (No Fluff):**
No boring slides. We show you the system, the real numbers, and answer your questions in 20 minutes.

**Step 2 — We Build It For You:**
We build the site, set up the AI, and import your contacts. You focus on business, we handle the tech. (7 Days).

**Step 3 — The Handoff & Launch:**
We hand you the keys, show you the "money buttons", and launch. You start closing deals on autopilot.

### FAQ

**Do I need to be "tech savvy"?**
No. If you can use email and text on your phone, you can use MinAI. We handle the heavy lifting.

**Does this replace my current website?**
It can, and it should. But if you love your current site, we can integrate our tools into it seamlessly.

**Is there a long-term contract?**
Never. We earn your business every month. Cancel anytime with a click.

**How fast can I get started?**
We can have your core system live in 7 days or less after onboarding.

---

## Products

### Talking Website
URL: https://minai.biz/products/functional-website

Get a lead-generating website in just days. Stop relying on static brochures. We build dynamic, high-converting websites optimized for speed, SEO, and immediate lead capture.

**Stats:**
- 75% judge credibility based on website
- 78% say a website boosted growth
- 67% trust seamless websites

**Key Features:**
- Actually Get Found Online: We ensure all our websites are properly indexed to appear on Google. We follow all of Google's best practices for SEO, optimized for page speed.
- Showcase Your Best Reviews: An online reputation is the most important part of any business. We showcase your top reviews on every page.
- Mobile Friendly: 87% of customers search for local businesses on mobile. Our optimizations include clear CTAs and quick load speeds.
- Instantly Starts SMS Conversations: Eliminate email back-and-forth for quotes. Chat widgets instantly start a text conversation with customers.

---

### All In One Inbox
URL: https://minai.biz/products/all-in-one-inbox

Every conversation in one place. Never lose a conversation again. Communicate with leads and customers across SMS, Email, Facebook, Instagram, and Web Chat.

**Stats:**
- 70% respond faster with one inbox
- 61% are less overwhelmed
- 83% become more organized

**Key Features:**
- 4-in-1 Unified Inbox: Consolidate Facebook messages, Instagram DMs, texts, and emails into one place. This ensures you never miss a lead.
- Efficiency & Organization: Manage and prioritize communications effortlessly, reducing overwhelm and increasing responsiveness.
- Speed-to-Lead: Get notified instantly the second a lead reaches out, allowing you to respond while intent is highest.
- Centralized Client History: View the entire history of any customer's conversation across all platforms in one single scroll.

---

### 5-Star Magic Review Funnel
URL: https://minai.biz/products/magic-review-funnel

Dominate your local search results. Your reputation is your strongest marketing asset. Our automated review injector sends personalized review requests.

**Stats:**
- 97% read reviews before buying
- 72% use Google reviews
- 2.7x more people buy services

**Key Features:**
- 5-Star Reviews Only: Redirect customers rating below 4 stars to private feedback so you can address issues directly.
- Automatic Follow-Up: We gently remind customers 4-5 times over four weeks until they leave their review.
- One-Click Requests: Just enter name and phone number — our system handles the rest seamlessly.
- Review Injector: Run campaigns to request reviews from your entire past customer list gradually.

---

### Missed Call Text Back
URL: https://minai.biz/products/missed-call-text-back

Instantly capture every missed opportunity. 85% of customers appreciate getting a text back after missing a call. Turn a missed call into a text conversation instantly.

**Stats:**
- 85% appreciate getting a text back
- 72% respond to texts vs voicemails
- 69% gain more customers

**Key Features:**
- Stand Out From Competition: Acknowledge missed calls with instant, customized messages redirecting to your website.
- No More Lost Leads: Prevent leads from moving to the next contractor by starting an instant conversation.
- Show Customers You Care: Show customers you're available and serious about their business.
- Available 24/7: Our system responds even after hours, ensuring every inquiry is addressed.

---

### Business Phone
URL: https://minai.biz/products/business-phone

Professional communication for your firm. Build trust with a professional business number. Track calls and separate your personal life from work.

**Stats:**
- 80% more calls lead to jobs
- 71% more likely to refer
- 58% handle appointments better

**Key Features:**
- Legal Branding: A dedicated line builds trust and shows you're serious about professional appearance.
- Marketing Insights: Track which marketing efforts are working based on call volume and source tracking.
- Work-Life Balance: Maintain clear boundaries by separating professional and personal calls on a single device.
- Enhanced Professionalism: Build trust with a dedicated number strictly for your firm.

---

### Marketing Campaigns
URL: https://minai.biz/products/one-click-marketing

Turn old leads into new profit. Sitting on a list of old leads? Our one-click reactivation campaigns send perfectly timed SMS and Email offers.

**Stats:**
- 98% read within 3 minutes
- 30% result in immediate sales
- 62% likely to engage with SMS promotions

**Key Features:**
- Reactivate Dead Leads: Run campaigns to get past leads through the door again instantly with targeted offers.
- Seasonal Sales Boost: Use holiday promos to rekindle interest and boost seasonal revenue significantly.
- Repeat Business: Nurture existing clients to encourage loyalty and long-term profit through consistent engagement.
- Automated Review Injection: Our system sends review requests that are read within 3 minutes, boosting your reputation.

---

### Local SEO
URL: https://minai.biz/products/local-seo

Be the #1 choice in your city. We handle the complex on-site, off-site, and technical SEO required to get your business ranking at the top.

**Stats:**
- 93% use Google to find local businesses
- 97% learn about companies online
- 46% searches have local purchase intent

**Key Features:**
- On-Site Optimization: Focus on content, keyword rankings, and technical structure to align with Google's algorithms.
- Market Visibility: Ensure your geographic targeting reaches the right local audience actively searching for your services.
- Technical Health: Constant evaluation of site speed, security, SSL, and mobile readiness for peak performance.
- Google Maps Domination: Maximize visibility on Google Maps so you are the #1 choice when local customers search.

---

### SMS Lead Follow-Up
URL: https://minai.biz/products/sms-lead-followup

Automated sequences that close. 70% of customers buy from the first responder. Our system ensures you are always first.

**Stats:**
- 70% buy from first responder
- 5min max response time goal
- 3x more likely to close

**Key Features:**
- Real-Time Response: Engage leads within 5 minutes when the intent is highest, significantly increasing conversion.
- Automated Nurturing: Stay top-of-mind without manual effort or reminders, turning cold prospects into warm leads.
- Increased ROI: Maximize the value of every dollar spent on lead acquisition by never letting a lead go cold.
- Higher Close Rates: Automated sequences ensure no lead falls through the cracks, closing 3x more deals on average.

---

## Pricing
URL: https://minai.biz/pricing

**Stop Paying For 10 Different Tools.**
One platform. One price. Unlimited growth. Replace your entire tech stack for less than the cost of your coffee budget.

### What MinAI Replaces
- Salesforce / Hubspot ($300+/mo) — INCLUDED
- Podium / Birdeye ($250+/mo) — INCLUDED
- ClickFunnels / Leadpages ($197/mo) — INCLUDED
- Calendly ($15/mo) — INCLUDED
- Mailchimp / ActiveCampaign ($100+/mo) — INCLUDED
- Wix / WordPress Hosting ($30/mo) — INCLUDED
- **Total Value: ~$900/mo** → MinAI: One Simple Price

### The Essentials — $297/month
For solopreneurs or those just starting. No setup fee.
- 2-Way SMS & Email: Unified Inbox
- Missed Call Text-Back
- Reputation Management
- Web Chat Widget
- Mobile App
- Payments: Accept CC via text

### The Growth Machine — $997/month (Recommended)
Complete business infrastructure. Setup fee applies.
Everything in Essentials, PLUS:
- Full Website Builder
- Workflows & Automation
- Database Reactivation
- Appointment Booking
- Unlimited Users
- Unlimited Contacts
- AI Content Planner

### No Contracts. No Hidden Fees.
- Cancel anytime with one click
- Add unlimited team members
- Send unlimited emails

### Case Studies

**John D., Roofing & Solar — SAVED $10K/MO IN MISSED CALLS**
"I'm on a roof all day. I can't answer the phone. MinAI's text-back feature literally saved my business."

**Sarah M., Property Development — SOLD 4 CONDOS IN 24 HOURS**
"We had 500 leads sitting in an Excel sheet. We uploaded them, hit 'Send', and booked 40 showings the next day."

**Mark T., Injury Law Partner — WE SIGN CASES INSTANTLY**
"Speed to lead is everything. If we don't answer in 5 mins, they're gone. MinAI answers instantly."

**David L., Real Estate Broker — REPLACED LAZY AGENTS**
"The system chases the leads automatically until they answer. My stress is gone."

**Jessica B., MedSpa Owner — CANCELLED SALESFORCE**
"I was paying for 6 different software subscriptions. MinAI replaced all of them for a fraction of the price."

**Mike R., HVAC Contractor — IT PAID FOR ITSELF IN 7 DAYS**
"I tried MinAI because there was no contract. It paid for itself in the first week."

## About Us
URL: https://minai.biz/about

**We Don't Do "Marketing". We Build Infrastructure.**

The world doesn't need another generic marketing agency. It needs engineers who understand that profit is the only metric that matters. We are System Architects.

### Our Mission
We got tired of watching good businesses burn money. We spent years inside the machine, watching owners get trapped by old-school "lead gen" traps — trapped answering phones all day, chasing leads that never picked up, paying for expensive leads they didn't have time to work. MinAI was built to kill that trap.

### The 3 Rules We Live By

1. **Profit First** — If our system doesn't make you more than it costs you, we don't want you as a client.
2. **Zero Friction** — Automation should make your life easier, not more complex. If a 10-year old can't use it, it's broken.
3. **Speed is Power** — If you don't answer a lead in 2 minutes, you're invisible. Our systems answer in seconds.

---
